name: Vasicek short-rate bond pricing
task: Create /tmp/eval_vsk/vsk.py with vasicek_bond_price(r0, a, b, sigma, T, t=0) returning the closed-form Vasicek zero-coupon bond price under dr = a(b - r) dt + sigma dW. Formulas: B(t,T) = (1 - exp(-a*tau)) / a where tau = T - t; A(t,T) = exp((B - tau)*(a²b - sigma²/2)/a² - sigma² B² / (4a)); P = A * exp(-B * r0). When a == 0 use the limit P = exp(-r0 * tau). Pure Python.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_vsk/vsk.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); V = mod.vasicek_bond_price; assert abs(V(0.05, 0.1, 0.05, 0.01, 1.0, 1.0) - 1.0) < 1e-9; p2 = V(0.05, 0.1, 0.05, 0.01, 5.0); assert abs(p2 - 0.7799356052658477) < 1e-9, f'T=5 price {p2} != closed form (A(t,T) must not be 1)'; p1 = V(0.05, 0.1, 0.05, 0.01, 1.0); assert abs(p1 - 0.9512441429652536) < 1e-9, f'T=1 price {p1}'; p3 = V(0.05, 0.1, 0.05, 0.01, 10.0); assert 0.9 < p1 < 1.0 and p2 < p1 and p3 < p2; assert V(0.10, 0.1, 0.05, 0.01, 5.0) < p2; print('OK')
